scripts.docker: docker build -t airbnb . && docker run -p 8080:8080 --env-file .env airbnb
scripts.k8s_kind: docker build -t airbnb . && kind create cluster --config kind-config.yaml && kind load docker-image airbnb --name kind && kubectl create configmap airbnb-config --from-env-file=.env && kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml
scripts.k8s_kind_redeploy: docker build -t airbnb:latest . && kind load docker-image airbnb:latest --name kind && kubectl rollout restart deployment airbnb && kubectl rollout status deployment airbnb
